search_terms_used: polarized training endurance runners performance systematic review meta-analysis
Seiler training intensity distribution endurance athletes 80/20 running
pyramidal vs polarized training distribution runners RCT comparison
Esteve-Lanao 2007 sub-elite runners training intensity distribution
coverage_notes: Excellent coverage from foundational Seiler work through 2025 network meta-analysis. Includes running-specific RCTs (Filipas 2022, Muñoz 2014, Esteve-Lanao 2007), 3 meta-analyses, and descriptive studies of elite TID. Both elite and recreational populations represented.

papers.title: Quantifying training intensity distribution in elite endurance athletes: is there evidence for an "optimal" distribution?
papers.journal: Scandinavian Journal of Medicine & Science in Sports
papers.notes: Quantified daily training intensity distribution in junior cross-country skiers using three different methods across 32 days.

papers.title: Impact of training intensity distribution on performance in endurance athletes
papers.journal: Journal of Strength and Conditioning Research
papers.notes: RCT comparing sub-threshold vs between-thresholds training emphasis in 12 sub-elite runners over 5 months.

papers.title: What is best practice for training intensity and duration distribution in endurance athletes?
papers.journal: International Journal of Sports Physiology and Performance
papers.notes: Comprehensive review proposing the 80/20 intensity distribution model based on descriptive studies of elite endurance athletes.

papers.title: Polarized training has greater impact on key endurance variables than threshold, high intensity, or high volume training
papers.notes: RCT comparing four training approaches (HVT, threshold, HIIT, polarized) in 48 well-trained endurance athletes over 9 weeks.

papers.title: Does polarized training improve performance in recreational runners?
papers.journal: International Journal of Sports Physiology and Performance
papers.notes: RCT of 30 recreational runners comparing polarized vs between-thresholds training on 10K performance over 10 weeks.

papers.title: The training intensity distribution among well-trained and elite endurance athletes
papers.notes: Review analyzing retrospective training data of elite endurance athletes to characterize pyramidal and polarized TID patterns.

papers.title: Polarized vs. Threshold Training Intensity Distribution on Endurance Sport Performance: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis of Randomized Controlled Trials
papers.journal: Journal of Strength and Conditioning Research
papers.notes: Meta-analysis of RCTs comparing polarized vs threshold training on endurance performance outcomes.

papers.title: Effects of 16 weeks of pyramidal and polarized training intensity distributions in well-trained endurance runners
papers.journal: Scandinavian Journal of Medicine & Science in Sports
papers.notes: RCT of 60 well-trained male runners comparing four periodization schemes combining pyramidal and polarized distributions over 16 weeks.

papers.title: Comparison of Polarized Versus Other Types of Endurance Training Intensity Distribution on Athletes' Endurance Performance: A Systematic Review with Meta-analysis
papers.notes: Systematic review and meta-analysis of 17 studies (n=437) comparing polarized TID vs other distributions on endurance performance.

papers.title: Which Training Intensity Distribution Intervention will Produce the Greatest Improvements in Maximal Oxygen Uptake and Time-Trial Performance in Endurance Athletes? A Systematic Review and Network Meta-analysis of Individual Participant Data
papers.notes: Network meta-analysis of individual participant data comparing all major TID interventions on VO2max and time-trial performance.
